scripts.dev: mkdir -p bin && cd daemon && go build -o ../bin/crewai-daemon ./cmd/crewai-daemon && cd .. && node electron/scripts/dev.cjs
scripts.build: mkdir -p bin && cd daemon && go build -o ../bin/crewai-daemon ./cmd/crewai-daemon && cd .. && vite build && node electron/scripts/build.cjs
scripts.test: cd daemon && go test ./... && cd .. && vitest run
